summary: Completed all steps. pre-1: added im v15 workspace dependency. step-1: wrote 12 PersistentMap unit tests with todo!() stubs (all fail). step-2: implemented PersistentMap<K,V> newtype over im::HashMap with full API (all 12 tests pass). step-3: added ValueCellId/Value compatibility test. step-4: migrated ValueMap inner from HashMap to PersistentMap (2-line change, zero consumer changes). step-5: full workspace regression — all 136 tests pass. step-6: added ValueMap clone structural sharing test. step-7: verified no remaining HashMap usage, no unused imports, final regression green. All plan steps complete.
